name: Apple Pudding Cake/Cinnamon Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup All purpose or unbleached flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Beat in egg.
3. Sift flour into a measuring cup, level off. Add flour, baking soda, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt; mix well.
4. Stir in chopped apples. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 25 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Meanwhile, combine all sauce ingredients in a small saucepan. Heat over medium heat until butter melts and sauce is hot, stirring frequently.
7. Serve warm sauce over warm cake.
